mapper.sql: incident_id, fingerprint, tenant_id, source_system, site_id, plant_id, object_type, object_id, event_type, error_code, severity, status, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, occurrence_count, last_message, linked_task_id, linked_issue_id, resolved_at, reopened_at, reopen_count, lifecycle_reason
mapper.insert: insert into incidents () values ( #{incident.incidentId}, #{incident.fingerprint}, #{incident.tenantId}, #{incident.sourceSystem}, #{incident.siteId}, #{incident.plantId}, #{incident.objectType}, #{incident.objectId}, #{incident.eventType}, #{incident.errorCode}, #{incident.severity}, #{incident.status}, #{incident.firstSeenAt}, #{incident.lastSeenAt}, #{incident.occurrenceCount}, #{incident.lastMessage}, #{incident.linkedTaskId}, #{incident.linkedIssueId}, #{incident.resolvedAt}, #{incident.reopenedAt}, #{incident.reopenCount}, #{incident.lifecycleReason} ) on conflict (incident_id) do update set fingerprint = excluded.fingerprint, tenant_id = excluded.tenant_id, source_system = excluded.source_system, site_id = excluded.site_id, plant_id = excluded.plant_id, object_type = excluded.object_type, object_id = excluded.object_id, event_type = excluded.event_type, error_code = excluded.error_code, severity = excluded.severity, status = excluded.status, first_seen_at = excluded.first_seen_at, last_seen_at = excluded.last_seen_at, occurrence_count = excluded.occurrence_count, last_message = excluded.last_message, linked_task_id = excluded.linked_task_id, linked_issue_id = excluded.linked_issue_id, resolved_at = excluded.resolved_at, reopened_at = excluded.reopened_at, reopen_count = excluded.reopen_count, lifecycle_reason = excluded.lifecycle_reason, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select * from incidents where fingerprint = #{fingerprint} and status in ('ACTIVE','ESCALATED') order by last_seen_at desc limit 1
select * from incidents where fingerprint = #{fingerprint} order by last_seen_at desc limit 1
select * from incidents order by last_seen_at desc limit 1000
